text:
Pride. Performance. Proven.

Pride in how far you’ve come.

Performance that keeps up with where you’re headed.

Proven engineering that backs every bold move you make.

Other features: Connected LED positioning lamp   I   LED tail lamps   I   Window belt line satin chrome   I   Satin chrome outside door handles R16 (D= 405.6 mm) Diamond cut alloys Bold bumper design (Rear) Dual LED projector headlamp Black chrome radiator grille Aerodynamic rear spoiler New New New New Every line, curve and detail of the new Hyundai VERNA reflects a generation that leads with confidence and style. Sharp, sculpted and unmistakably premium.

Designed to turn heads.

And raise standards.

Where ambition takes a seat.

Step into a space designed around modern success. Refined materials, intelligent layouts and thoughtful comfort come together to create an interior that feels as progressive as your mindset.

D-cut steering wheel Front ventilated seats Dual 52.06 cm (10.25” + 10.25”) integrated displays (Infotainment & cluster) Other features: Sliding front center armrest with storage   I   Smart key with push button start   I   Metal pedals (Turbo only)   I   Leatherette wrapped gear knob Dual tone beige & black interiors with ambient light (Dashboard & door trims) New Biggest in segment

Intelligence, beautifully integrated.

Advanced technology that feels intuitive, not overwhelming.

The new Hyundai VERNA connects effortlessly with your world, offering smart features that anticipate your needs and elevate every drive.

Other features: Ambient sounds of nature (10 nos.)   I   Multi language Ul support-cluster & infotainment (12 nos.) Over-the-air update (Infotainment system & map)   I   More than 350 embedded voice recognition commands

** Works with select Android & Apple smartphones only. Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto in HX 10 & HX 8 through wired to wireless adapter.

All trademarks mentioned herein belong to their respective owners.

3 Years free Bluelink subscription with 70+ Bluelink features Bose premium sound 8 speaker system

26.03 cm (10.25”) Multi display digital cluster Blind-spot view monitor (BVM) Smart trunk Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto** 1st in segment 1st in segment New Biggest in segment 1st in segment 1st in segment Surround view monitor (SVM)

Comfort that keeps up.

From daily drives to long journeys, the new Hyundai VERNA makes everything feel seamless.

Smart conveniences work quietly in the background, so you can focus on what truly matters.

Spacious cabin – Ample head room, shoulder room and knee room Longest wheelbase & widest car in segment Other features: Rear center armrest with cup holder   I   USB charger (C-Type front & rear)   I   Rear AC vents   I   Rear adjustable headrests Driver memory seat with welcome retract Passenger seat electric walk-in device Electric driver seat with 8-way adjust Electric passenger seat with 4-way adjust Rear window sunshade New 1st in segment 1st in segment 1st in segment New

Segment’s most powerful 1.5 l turbo engine 7-Speed dual clutch transmission (DCT)

Intelligent variable transmission (iVT) 6-Speed manual transmission (MT)

1.5 l Turbo GDi Petrol

1.5 l MPi Petrol 117.5 kW (160 PS) @ 5 500 r/min Max power 253 Nm (25.8 kgm) @ 1 500~3 500 r/min Max torque

84.4 kW (115 PS) @ 6 300 r/min Max power 143.8 Nm (14.7 kgm) @ 4 500 r/min Max torque Perfomance that matches your pace.

Quick decisions. Faster moves. The new Hyundai VERNA delivers responsive performance that feels effortless yet exhilarating. Engineered to perform when you do, smooth and thrilling on demand.

1st in segment 7 Airbags (Driver, passenger, side, curtain & center side) Safety that you can trust.

Built with robust safety at its core, the new Hyundai VERNA is engineered to protect what matters most.

Thoughtful systems and strong fundamentals ensure peace of mind, wherever the journey takes you.

Other features: ISOFIX   I   Hill-start assist control (HAC)   I   Headlamp escort function   I   Seatbelt reminder (all seats) Emergency stop signal (ESS)   I   Electronic stability control (ESC) with VSM 1st in segment Front parking assist sensor (FPAS) Rain sensing wipers All 4 disc brakes (Front & rear) Tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS) – Highline 35 Standard safety features More than 75 advanced safety features Standard across all variants 6 airbags Dashcam Electronic parking brake (EPB) with auto hold New

Advanced driver assistance systems work together to enhance awareness and control. Because true progress isn’t just about moving faster, it’s about moving smarter and safer.

Level 2 ADAS.

Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist

- Pedestrian (FCA-Ped) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Car (FCA-Car) & Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist

- Cycle (FCA-Cyl) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist - Junction Turning (FCA-JT) Leading Vehicle Departure Alert (LVDA) Lane Keeping Assist (LKA) Lane Departure Warning (LDW) Lane Following Assist (LFA) High Beam Assist (HBA) Rear Cross - Traffic Collision - Avoidance Assist (RCCA) & Rear Cross - Traffic Collision Warning (RCCW) Blind-spot Collision - Avoidance Assist (BCA) & Blind-spot Collision Warning (BCW) Safe Exit Warning (SEW) Driver Attention Warning (DAW) Smart Cruise Control with Stop & Go (SCC with S&G)

Crafted with intent.

*Terms & Conditions apply. For representation and information purposes only. Some of the equipment illustrated or described in this leaflet may not be supplied as standard equipment and may be available at extra cost. • Hyundai Motor India Limited reserves the right to change specifications and equipment without prior notice. Functionality of Bluelink depends on adequate power supply and uninterrupted network connectivity to infotainment system. The Bluelink system is designed in such a way that it makes vehicle theft difficult if its circuit and battery connection is uninterrupted • Bluelink will be available on paid basis post the 3-year period. Hyundai SmartSense, the Advanced Driver Assistance System is not a substitute for safe and attentive driving. Its effectiveness depends on various factors. Availability of Hyundai SmartSense features may differ by variants. • Segment comparisons based on product specs mentioned in respective official websites as on 8th March 2026 • RSA till 3 years is provided on free of cost basis on purchase of the new Hyundai VERNA. Complimentary Roadside Assistance and Bluelink subscription (for eligible variants) are provided with the purchase of Extended Warranty. • ##Upto 7 years extended warranty is applicable for all variants. It is applicable for upto 7 years or 1 40 000 kms whichsoever earlier • The colour plates shown may vary slightly from the actual colours due to the limitations of the printing process. Please consult your dealer for full information and availability on colours and trim. ^^For detailed Terms & Conditions of Warranty refer owner’s manual.

For more details on JioSaavn, refer T&C and Privacy Policy on

- https://www.jiosaavn.com/corporate/terms/. Extended warranty, RSA and Shield of Trust packages are on a payable basis. For detailed Terms & Conditions of Extended Warranty & Shield of Trust/Super/Bodycare kindly visit Hyundai India website. https://www.hyundai.com/ Peace of mind Mar, 2026 3 Years Bluelink subscription Shield of Trust Bodycare Body Maintenance Package^^
